zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Richardson於1649年6月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，他的父親Samuel Richardson46歲，母親Joane Thake11646歲。他於1674年10月31日與Abigail Wyman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1717年3月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年67歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Richardson于1649年6月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，他的父亲Samuel Richardson46岁，母亲Joane Thake11646岁。他于1674年10月31日与Abigail Wyman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1717年3月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年67岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Richardson was born on 15 June 1649, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Samuel Richardson, was 46 and his mother, Joane Thake, was 11646. He married Abigail Wyman on 31 October 1674, in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 March 1717, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67, and was buried in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Richardson est né le 15 juin 1649, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Richardson, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joane Thake, avait 11646 ans. Il a épousé Abigail Wyman le 31 octobre 1674, à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1717, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Richardson am 15. Juni 1649 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Richardson 46 und seine Mutter Joane Thake 11646. Er hat am 31. Oktober 1674 in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Abigail Wyman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1717 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Richardson è nato il il 15 giugno 1649 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Samuel Richardson, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Joane Thake, aveva 11646 anni. Lui sposato Abigail Wyman il 31 ottobre 1674, nel Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1717, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Richardsonが1649年6月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Samuel Richardsonは46歳，母Joane Thakeは11646歳であった。1674年10月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカでAbigail Wymanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1717年3月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで67歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번

ko.Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카
ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Richardson(이)가 1649년 6월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Richardson(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Thake(은)는 11646세였다. 그는 1674년 10월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카에서 Abigail Wyman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1717년 3월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Richardson nasceu em 15 de junho de 1649, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Richardson, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joane Thake, tinha 11646 anos. Ele casou-se com Abigail Wyman em 31 de outubro de 1674, em Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1717, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Richardson родился 15 июня 1649 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Samuel Richardson было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Thake, 11646. Он женился на женщине по имени Abigail Wyman 31 октября 1674 г. в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 марта 1717 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen Richardson nació el 15 de junio de 1649, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Samuel Richardson, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joane Thake, tenía 11646 años. Se casó con Abigail Wyman el 31 de octubre de 1674, en Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1717, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
